notes.f1: Exact birth 22 Nov 1910, La Unión (Montes de Oca), Guerrero recovered and written to Mauro's birth fact, from the indexed Guerrero civil birth registration — the agent bridged from Mauro's later Michoacán residence to his Guerrero birth region using the siblings' Guerrero birth-state lead.
notes.f2: Father Sóstenes Cruz recovered and linked (I1), from the birth registration and independently corroborated by a sibling's (Primitivo's) 1935 Guerrero marriage record naming the same parents.
notes.f3: Mother Apolinar Corona recovered and linked (I2), same two sources.
notes.f4: Paternal grandparents (Jesús Cruz / Donaciana Basurto) not recovered — bonus finding; the agent did not extract or persist grandparent persons.
notes.f5: Maternal grandparents (Miguel Corona / Jesús Mercado) not recovered — bonus finding.
